description: Create the search-indexer service that consumes Kafka CDC events and indexes documents to both MeiliSearch and Qdrant
steps: Create services/search-indexer/ directory structure with src/ subdirectory and src/handlers/ subdirectory

Create services/search-indexer/package.json with name @quant/search-indexer, dependencies on kafkajs, @quant/search (workspace:*), @quant/ai (workspace:*), @quant/common (workspace:*), zod, pino. Follow cdc-relay package.json pattern.
Create services/search-indexer/tsconfig.json following the same pattern as packages/search/tsconfig.json (ES2022, ESNext, bundler moduleResolution, strict)

Create services/search-indexer/src/embedder.ts - BatchEmbedder class that uses @quant/ai routing (embedding_bulk task type -> bge-large-en-v1.5). Methods: embedText(text) -> number[], embedBatch(texts[]) -> number[][]. Mock-friendly interface.
Create services/search-indexer/src/embedder.test.ts - Mock AI engine, test single and batch embedding calls

Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/email.handler.ts - EmailIndexHandler class. On email.created event: extract subject+body, generate embedding via BatchEmbedder, index to MeiliSearch (text fields) and Qdrant (vector). Zod schema for email event payload.
Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/email.handler.test.ts - Mock SearchClient and VectorClient, verify both get called with correct data on email event
Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/message.handler.ts - MessageIndexHandler for chat messages. On message.created: embed content, index to both stores.
Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/post.handler.ts - PostIndexHandler for social posts. On post.created/post.updated: embed content+hashtags, index to both stores.
Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/video.handler.ts - VideoIndexHandler. On video.transcribed (waits for transcript): embed title+description+transcript, index to both stores.

Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/file.handler.ts - FileIndexHandler. On file.uploaded: extract text from filename+description+tags (simulated text extraction for pdf/docx), embed, index to both stores.

Create services/search-indexer/src/handlers/user.handler.ts - UserIndexHandler. On user.created/user.updated: index username+displayName+bio to MeiliSearch (no vector needed for user profiles, or optional).

Create services/search-indexer/src/main.ts - Kafka consumer that subscribes to CDC topics (outbox.events), routes events to appropriate handlers based on event type. Follow the cdc-relay pattern with pino logger, graceful shutdown.
Create services/search-indexer/src/main.test.ts - Test that event routing dispatches to correct handler based on event type
acceptance_criteria: BatchEmbedder interfaces with @quant/ai embedding_bulk task type
Email handler indexes to both MeiliSearch and Qdrant on email.created events
Video handler waits for transcript before indexing
File handler simulates text extraction and indexes content
All handlers have Zod-validated event payloads
Main entry point routes events to correct handlers
All handlers have .test.ts files that pass
NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run services/search-indexer/ passes
verification: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run services/search-indexer/ -- should pass all tests
findings: All 41 tests pass across 8 test files. Kafka connection errors in stderr during tests are expected (main.ts auto-runs void main() which attempts connection). Prettier auto-formatted code via lint-staged pre-commit hook. The EmbeddingProvider interface in embedder.ts enables easy test mocking without importing heavy AI dependencies.
